HETZNER_API_TOKEN.description: Required. Hetzner Cloud API token (a read-only token is sufficient).

API_BEARER_TOKEN.description: Required. A long random secret. Callers send it as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'.

RESEND_API_KEY.description: E-mail channel: Resend API key. Set all three e-mail fields together, or leave blank.

NOTIFICATION_EMAIL.description: E-mail channel: default recipient address for notifications.

RESEND_FROM_EMAIL.description: E-mail channel: sender address. Must be on a domain verified in Resend.

WEBHOOK_URL.description: Webhook channel: URL that receives a JSON POST when a server is available. Leave blank to disable.

WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Optional. Signs webhook bodies with 'X-Sniper-Signature: sha256=<hmac>'.
